listings.notice_text: Foreclosure Sale Trustee's Sale 197 FT KING DR, COLONIAL BEACH, VA 22443 (Parcel ID: 6B 4 K 5) Default having been made in the terms of a certain Deed of Trust dated 9/26/2022, in the original principal amount of $201,531.00 and recorded in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of the Westmoreland County, Virginia on 9/27/2022, as Instrument No. 220003767, in Book 959, Page 1948, the undersigned Substitute Trustees will sell at public auction on 6/5/2026 at 3:00 PM, Front of building of the Circuit Court Building For Westmoreland County, 175 Polk Street, Montross, Virginia 22520, the property designated as 197 FT KING DR, COLONIAL BEACH, VA 22443. Lot 5, Block K, Section 4, Westmoreland Shores, as shown on a plat of said Section 4, Westmoreland Shores, dated 11 February 1957, made by Brooks and Barton, C.L.S., Richmond, Virginia, and duly recorded in the Office or the Clerk of the Circuit Court of Westmoreland County, Virginia, in Deed Book 154 at Page 560 and 561, to which plat reference is made for the metes and bounds of said lot. TERMS: CASH. A deposit of $20,153.10 or 10% of the sale price, whichever is lower, will be required of the successful bidder at time of sale. Prior to the sale, interested bidders will be required to register with and must present a bid deposit which may be held during the sale by the trustee. The bid deposit must be certified funds and/or cash, but no more than $9,900.00 of cash will be accepted. The successful bidder's deposit will be retained at the sale and applied to the sale price. If held by the trustee, all other bid deposits will be returned to the unsuccessful bidders. Settlement is to be made within 15 days. The successful bidder will be responsible for obtaining possession of the property, and for all costs and fees related to recording the Trustee's Deed, including the grantors tax. The successful bidder will be required to execute a Memorandum of Trustee's Sale, available for review upon request before the sale, outlining additional terms of sale and settlement. A Trustee's Deed will be prepared by Trustee's attorney at high bidder's expense. This is a communication from a debt collector. Vylla Solutions - Virginia, LLC, 283 Constitution Drive, Suite 102, Office B, Virginia Beach, VA 23462, File No. 26-39071, Tel: 888-313-1969 **********END OF ADVERTISEMENT********** RICHMOND COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-05-27

Foreclosure Sale NOTICE OF SUBSTITUTE TRUSTEE’S SALE (15885 Kings Highway, Montross, VA 22520) Tax Map Reference Nos.: 34-16F; 34A2-1-5-10; 34A2-1-5-12; 34A2-1-5-13; and 34-16H Pursuant to the terms of certain Deed of Trust dated April 27, 2004 (the “ Deed of Trust ”) and recorded April 27, 2004 in the Clerk’s Office for the Circuit Court of Westmoreland County at Book 638, Page 569, the real property described in the Deed of Trust commonly known as 15885 Kings Highway, Montross, Virginia 22520, and all improvements related thereto (collectively, the “ Property ”), as set forth below and as more specifically described in the Deed of Trust, to which reference is hereby made, will be offered for sale at public auction: Parcel 1 : All that certain parcel of land situate in the Town of Montross, Westmoreland County, Virginia, containing an area of 4,987 square feet, the metes and bounds of which are shown by plat of survey of Richard B. Allison, Jr., C.L.S., dated August 4, 1987, entitled "Plat Showing a Portion of the Property of Max Anderson & Cynthia I. Fowler," a copy of which is recorded in the Circuit Court Clerk's Office of Westmoreland County, Virginia, in Deed Book 344 at Page 135. (Tax Map No. 34-16F) Parcel 2 : All that certain parcel of land situate in the Town of Montross, Westmoreland County, Virginia, containing an area of 20,286 square feet, the metes and bounds of which are shown by plat of survey of Richard B. Allison, Jr., C.L.S., dated December 19, 1986, and entitled "Plat Showing Parcel A & Parcel B, A Portion of the Property of W. Norris Lowery, Town of Montross," a copy of which is recorded in the said Clerk's Office in Deed Book 335 at Page 485, said lot being designated thereon as "Parcel B." (Tax Map No. 34A2-1-5-12) Parcel 3 : All that certain lot fronting 65 feet on State Highway No. 3 and extending back at right angles between parallel lines a distance of 146 feet, shown oh a certain plat of survey of J. Arthur Cooke, C.L.S., dated March 21, 1953, and entitled "Survey Showing Property Lines in Vicinity of Post Office, Montross, Westmoreland County, Virginia," upon which said lot is located in the office building known as the B & P Building, the said plat being of record in the Clerk's Office of the Circuit Court of Westmoreland Count, Virginia, in Deed Book 146 at Page 156. (Tax Map No. 34A2-1-5-10) Parcel 4 : All that certain lot fronting 55 feet on State Highway No. 3 and extending back at right angles between parallel lines a distance of 150 feet, the metes and bounds of which are shown by a certain plat of survey of J. Arthur Cooke, C.L.S., dated June 22, 1953, recorded with a certain deed in said Clerk's Office in Deed Book 146 at Page 158. (Tax Map No. 34A2-1-5-13) Being the same property conveyed unto IBABI, INC., a Virginia Corporation, by deed dated December 26, 1997, and recorded in the aforesaid Clerk's Office in Deed Book 480 at Page 681. Parcel 5 : All that certain lot, piece or parcel of land lying, being and situate in Westmoreland County, Virginia, and containing 1.7704 acres, which is bounded by the line "A" and "B", as shown on plat of survey made by Richard B. Allison, Jr., C.L.S., dated March 11, 1999, and entitled "Plat Showing Property Line Adjustment Between the Properties of Rita Donner and IBABI, INC...," a copy of which is recorded in the said Clerk's Office in Deed Book 504 at Page 116. (Tax Map No. 34-16H) Being the same property conveyed unto IBABI, INC., a Virginia Corporation; by Deed of Boundary Line Adjustment dated March 16, 1999, and recorded in the aforesaid Clerk's Office in Deed Book 504 at Page 114. The sale will take place at 15885 Kings Highway, Montross, VA 22520 and via simultaneous online auction on June 12, 2026, at 12:00 p.m. (prevailing Eastern Time) . Terms: The purchase price in the form of immediately available funds will be due and payable on the closing date. A deposit in the form of immediately available funds in the amount of $50,000 will be required of the successful bidder at the time of sale. The high bidder will be required to increase the deposit to an amount equal to 10% of the high bid within 3 business days of the sale date. The successful bidder will be required to close within thirty (30) days of the date of sale. Time will be of the essence as to the closing date and the payment of the purchase price. In the event an auctioneer is used in connection with the sale of the Property, there may be included a buyer’s premium of 5% added to the highest bid to determine the purchase price that must be paid by the successful bidder. All loss or damage to the Property from the time of sale and before settlement shall be at the risk of the successful bidder. The Property will be sold subject to all encumbrances that are not extinguished by operation of law by the sale and subject to all easements, equitable servitudes, conditions, rights of way, restrictions, rights of redemption, covenants, declarations, and restrictions of reco

Foreclosure Sale TRUSTEE’S SALE OF 1414 FLAT IRON RD, MONTROSS, VA 22520 In execution of a certain Deed of Trust dated August 30, 2021, in the original principal amount of $293,584.00 recorded in the Clerk’s Office, Circuit Court for Westmoreland County, Virginia, in Book 947 at Page 174 as Instrument No. 210004231. The undersigned Substitute Trustee will offer for sale at public auction in the front of the Circuit Court building for Westmoreland County, 175 Polk Street, Montross, VA 22520, or any such temporary alternative Circuit Court location designated by the Judges of the Circuit Court, on June 5, 2026, at 9:30 AM, the property described in said Deed of Trust, located at the above address, and more particularly described as follows: ALL THAT CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND SITUATE IN WASHINGTON MAGISTERIAL DISTRICT, WESTMORELAND COUNTY, VIRGINIA AND DESCRIBED BY METES AND BOUNDS AS LOT 1 CONTAINING AN AREA OF 1.623 ACRES UPON A PLAT OF SURVEY BY EDWARD G. HOLSINGER, C.L.S., DATED MARCH 12, 2007 AND RECORDED IN THE OFFICE OF THE CLERK OF THE CIRCUIT COURT OF WESTMORELAND COUNTY, VIRGINIA, AS PLAT SLIDE 538 (SEE DEED BOOK 756 AT PAGE 573). TOGETHER WITH AN EASEMENT OF INGRESS AND EGRESS 20 FEET IN WIDTH COMMENCING AT THE NORTHEASTERN CORNER OF LOT 1 AND PROCEEDING IN THE SOUTHWESTERLY DIRECTION ALONG THE EASTERN BOUNDARY OF LOT 1 AND ANOTHER PARCEL LABELED "RESIDUE" WHERE IT INTERSECTS WITH A 20 FOOT RIGHT OF WAY EASEMENT AND FURTHER TOGETHER WITH AN EASEMENT FOR INGRESS AND EGRESS 20 FEET IN WIDTH FORM SUCH INTERSECTION AND PROCEEDING IN A SOUTHWESTERLY DIRECTION TO IT TERMINUS AT STATE ROUTE #624 ALL OF WHICH IS DEPICTED UPON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. FURTHER WITH THE FOLLOWING EASEMENTS: A 15 FOOT UTILITY EASEMENT AS SET FORTH ON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. AND AN EASEMENT FOR PRIMARY AND RESERVE DRAIN FIELDS AND A 5 FOOT EASEMENT ASSOCIATED THEREWITH ALL OF WHICH IS DEPICTED ON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. FURTHER WITH THE FOLLOWING EASEMENTS: A 15 FOOT UTILITY EASEMENT AS SET FORTH ON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. AN EASEMENT FOR PRIMARY AND RESERVE DRAIN FIELDS AND A 5 FOOT EASEMENT ASSOCIATED THEREWITH ALL OF WHICH IS DEPICTED ON THE ABOVE REFERENCED PLAT OF SURVEY. TERMS OF SALE: ALL CASH. A bidder’s deposit of ten percent (10%) of the sale price or ten percent (10%) of the original principal balance of the subject Deed of Trust, whichever is lower, in the form of cash or certified funds payable to the Substitute Trustee must be present at the time of the sale. The balance of the purchase price will be due within fifteen (15) days of sale, otherwise Purchaser’s deposit may be forfeited to Trustee. Time is of the essence. If the sale is set aside for any reason, the Purchaser at the sale shall be entitled to a return of the deposit paid. The Purchaser may, if provided by the terms of the Trustee’s Memorandum of Foreclosure Sale, be entitled to a $50 cancellation fee from the Substitute Trustee, but shall have no further recourse against the Mortgagor, the Mortgagee or the Mortgagee’s attorney. A form copy of the Trustee’s memorandum of foreclosure sale and contract to purchase real property is available for viewing at www.aldridgepite.com. Additional terms, if any, to be announced at the sale and the Purchaser may be given the option to execute the contract of sale electronically. This is a communication from a debt collector and any information obtained will be used for that purpose. The sale is subject to seller confirmation. Substitute Trustee: Equity Trustees, LLC, 8100 Three Chopt Road, Suite 240, Richmond, VA 23229. If you have any questions or concerns, please contact the Virginia Pre-Sale Department of counsel for Equity Trustees, LLC at 301-961-6555, website: www.aldridgepite.com. VA-381755-1. RICHMOND COUNTY, VIRGINIA 2026-05-06
